newsBriefing: Monaco landed a statement 3-1 win at PSG, tightening the title race and handing the reigning European champions a damaging result days before their Champions League showdown with Chelsea.

games.headline: Monaco punish shaky PSG to win 3-1 before Chelsea showdown
games.brief: Monaco took full advantage of PSG mistakes and poor defensive transitions, winning 3-1 in Paris and exposing real fragility in Luis Enrique's side ahead of a season-defining Champions League tie with Chelsea. PSG briefly threatened a comeback after Bradley Barcola made it 2-1, but Folarin Balogun struck quickly to kill the momentum and seal a major away result for Monaco.
bullets: Monaco won 3-1 at the Parc des Princes, with goals from Maghnes Akliouche, Aleksandr Golovin and Folarin Balogun.
Balogun scored his fifth goal in his last five games and now has 13 goals in all competitions this season.
PSG cut it to 2-1 through Bradley Barcola's 10th goal of the season, but conceded again shortly after.
PSG have now lost four Ligue 1 matches in 25 games this season and seven matches in all competitions in 2025-26.
Monaco are unbeaten in seven league matches (5 wins, 2 draws) and climbed to fifth in the table.
games.context: The defeat could shrink PSG's title lead to one point and raises pressure before the Champions League last-16 first leg against Chelsea.
